blocker.message: No OTVM OpenBSD arm64 profile is currently available, and no scripted SSH access to the user-owned OpenBSD arm64 server has been configured for this repository. This is tracked as a documented non-release blocker rather than a package-pipeline failure.

details.otvm_catalog: catalog-list exposes openbsd-7.8-fvwm but no OpenBSD arm64 profile as of April 21, 2026
details.required_next_step: Add an OTVM OpenBSD arm64 profile or provide scripted host access, then build, install, smoke, and remove tools-xctest on that host.
